metadata.title: Business Term Certificates | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Bank provides a complete range of short term and long-term deposit certificates with the flexibility of monthly, quarterly, semi-annual and annual returns. That Includes Certificate of Islamic Investment, Meezan Amdaan Certificate, Monthly Mudarabah Certificate, Dollar Mudarabah Certificate.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Term Deposits Riba Free Term Deposit Certificates Corporate Banking Cash Management Bank Accounts Term Deposits Treasury Corporate Payroll Card Meezan Payroll Partner If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Truly Halal Returns Meezan Bank provides a complete range of short term and long term deposit certificates with the flexibility of monthly, quarterly, semi-annual and annual returns Certificate of Islamic Investment Periodic Profit through 3 to 5 Year Investment The of Islamic Investment (COII) is a Mudarabah-based deposit product through which you can invest your savings for periods ranging from 3 months to 5 years and earn Halal profit on a periodic basis. Learn More Meezan Amdaan Certificate A long-term investment with Monthly High Return Meezan Amdan Certificate is a Mudarabah-based long-term deposit product that offers a high expected return to investors and is ideal for those individuals and corporate clients who need a regular stream of monthly income. Learn More Monthly Mudarabah Certificate Short Term Investment with Regular Monthly Returns The Riba-Free Monthly Mudarabah Certificate (MMC) is a short-term deposit product which has been designed to give you expected monthly returns. Learn More Dollar Mudarabah Certificate An Investment in US Dollars to Earn Profit The Dollar Mudarabah Certificate (DMC) is a can invest your US Dollars with Meezan Bank 3 months to 3 years and earn six-monthly or at maturity profit payments on your investment.
